<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.40.5-Bratislava">
  <identifier>PEA.DS_CircuitBreaker</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>TH</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>PEA.DS_CircuitBreaker</title>
  <abstract>REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.

REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <contact>
    <name></name>
    <organization></organization>
    <position></position>
    <voice></voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email></email>
    <role></role>
  </contact>
  <links>
    <link description="" name="SDE Feature Class" mimeType="" type="ArcSDE Connection" format="" size="" url="Server=172.27.252.200; Service=5159; User=472215; Version=SDE.DEFAULT"/>
  </links>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Access">REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.</constraints>
  <rights>REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt></wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=utm +zone=47 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>0</srsid>
      <srid>0</srid>
      <authid></authid>
      <description></description>
      <projectionacronym></projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym></ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial minz="0" maxz="0" crs="EPSG:4326" miny="786134.40554900001734495" maxy="1114116.60854899999685585" dimensions="2" minx="422588.46710800001164898" maxx="647072.8061079999897629"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start></start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
